heading: Department of Defense: seal
label: 112 Department of Defense: seal
text: The Secretary of Defense shall have a seal for the Department of Defense. The design of the seal is subject to approval by the President. Judicial notice shall be taken of the seal.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1325:171a(e).; added (10th par.), .July 26, 1947, ch. 343, § 202(e)Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 412, § 563 Stat. 580
